incidents.headline: Exposed Hacker Server Reveals WP-SHELLSTORM Backdooring Thousands of WordPress Sites
incidents.summary: A cybercrime crew exposed one of its servers, revealing details about a mass site-hacking operation that targeted over 1.4 million websites.

actors.name: O-UNC-066
actors.recent_activity: Deploying a panel-controlled phishing kit targeting Microsoft 365 passkey enrollment.

hunting_indicators.title: Phishing Kit for Passkey Enrollment
hunting_indicators.context: Targeting Microsoft 365 users to carry out data extortion attacks.

vulnerabilities.description: Unauthenticated RCE vulnerability in the CSV_Agents class due to insufficient sandboxing and an incomplete list of disallowed inputs.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Apply patches or update to a version with fixed vulnerabilities.

incidents.headline: AWS designated as a critical third party to the UK financial sector
incidents.summary: Amazon Web Services EMEA Sarl (AWS) has been designated as a critical third party (CTP) to the UK financial sector by HM Treasury.

incidents.headline: Accenture data breach
incidents.summary: A data breach at Accenture required working with DMARC partners for setting up DMARC and BIMI, then using a trusted Certificate Authority to purchase a Mark Certificate.

vulnerabilities.description: A compromised version of the jscrambler npm package, 8.14.0, includes a preinstall hook that drops and executes a native binary upon installation.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Avoid installing the affected version or use a different package.

hunting_indicators.context: Compromised jscrambler npm package

actors.motivation: Espionage, possibly related to geopolitical tensions between China and India
actors.recent_activity: Sustained cyber espionage campaign against Pakistani law enforcement organizations from February 2024 to April 2026.
